case_title: CORPORATE CAR MANAGEMENT LLC VS. OLIVET UNIVERSITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,858.85 FILED BY CORPORATE CAR MANAGEMENT LLC AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVET UNIVERSITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
